rows.original:
"Oh," Kalysea says suddenly, stopping in her tracks. "Aren’t these beautiful?"
    
    She’s looking at a cluster of flowers sprouting from under an outcropping of rock. They're not particularly spectacular, but the fashion in which they're persevering has a type of rugged beauty to it. Kalysea stops and bends down, reaching for some.
    
    "Would you help me make a flower crown, [pc.name]?" she asks.
    
    "A quick break won't hurt," you say.
    
    You find yourself kneeling down next to Kalysea, picking flowers out alongside the druid.
    
    "Have you thought about your future, [pc.name]?" she asks. "What you will do beyond your adventure?"
    
    "I have, but ultimately I have to get there to worry about it properly," you say. "Have you?"
    
    She studies you for a moment. "I'm still thinking about what to do."
    
    You nod, looking down at the flowers in your hand. "Well, you'd best hurry. I don't think the demons are going to give us much time to decide."
    
    Kalysea pauses – then picks up another flower. "That is true enough."
    
    The two of you work together to create a wreathe of flowers, and to your mild surprise she places it on your head instead of her own. She smiles [pc.isHeight 84
        |
        |down 
    ]at you. "Receive the druid's blessing."
    
    You smile. "Thanks."
    
    For a while, you journey with a crown of flowers set atop your head.
